content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: domain param parsing added right before generic assign branch in parse() while-loop (checks token.value=='domain' with assign, validates Const str, raises TemplateAssertionError on dup/non-string), added domain param as last positional arg to _make_node() call and signature, routes to dgettext/dngettext nodes.Name calls, added dgettext/dngettext helper wrappers + wired into _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall/GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS. Note: I did NOT change the 'if variables:' comma guard (kept as-is, matches existing trimmed behavior) - if a merge combines both diffs, the guard should become 'if variables or metadata or domain is not None:' and _make_node's positional arg order (domain vs metadata) will need reconciling since we both appended as last positional.

fields.summary: Done: domain param parsing added right before generic assign branch in parse() while-loop (checks token.value=='domain' with assign, validates Const str, raises TemplateAssertionError on dup/non-string), added domain param as last positional arg to _make_node() call and signature, routes to dgettext/dngettext nodes.Name calls, added dgettext/dngettext helper wrappers + wired into _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall/GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS. Note: I did NOT change the 'if variables:' comma guard (kept as-is, matches existing trimmed behavior) - if a merge combines both diffs, the guard should become 'if variables or metadata or domain is not None:' and _make_node's positional arg order (domain vs metadata) will need reconciling since we both appended as last positional.
